Name: Alternation
Effect: If the bearer has only used one element to cause damage during their turn: they gain +20% to their Elemental Mastery in their other elements

Name: Alternation II
Effect: If the bearer inflicts damage in an element:  they gain +15% Elemental Mastery in the other elements for the next spell.  Only the first line of damage caused by the spell is taken into account.

Name: Ancestral Energy
Effect: At start of turn, with 6 WP or greater:  Ancestral Energy Bonus (Max. level: 3): 4% Damage inflicted 15 Elemental Resistance The state is lost if the character starts their turn with less than 6 WP

Name: Arrogance
Effect: Steals 25% of melee damage inflicted -100 Elemental Resistance

Name: Assimilation
Effect: -50 Elemental Resistance If the state bearer takes damage from an enemy:  100 Resistance in the damage element (1 turn)

Name: Beyond the Barrier
Effect: If the spell costs 4 AP or more: 15% critical damage. If the spell costs 1 WP or more: 15% critical damage

Name: Brazier
Effect: 10% damage inflicted when the bearer meets certain conditions (these change each turn).  Turn 1: The bearer is in melee or the spell is single-target  Turn 2: The bearer is at a distance or the spell is single-target  Turn 3: The bearer is at a distance or the spell is area-of-effect  Turn 4: The bearer is in melee or the spell is area-of-effect

Name: Breeze
Effect: 25% to area-of-effect spell damage on the spell's direct target -25% to area-of-effect spell damage on other targets

Name: Calibration
Effect: If the bearer inflicted melee damage on an enemy during their turn:  25% Ranged Damage Inflicted for the following turn

Name: Calibration II
Effect: If the bearer inflicted melee damage on an enemy during their turn:  10% Ranged Damage Inflicted for the following turn Once per turn, stackable up to 5 times

Name: Contact
Effect: At end of turn, per adjacent enemy:  5% of max HP as Armor

Name: Directives
Effect: 15% damage inflicted by area-of-effect spells on targets in line with the state bearer

Name: Distribution
Effect: When the bearer heals an ally, 50% of healing is converted into Armor

Name: Ebullience
Effect: If the bearer moves themself using a spell:  1 AP (max 2 per turn)

Name: Excess
Effect: -10% Damage inflicted  Every 10 spells cast, the state bearer gains 100% Damage inflicted for the next spell  Spells cast must cost at least 1 AP  Once the state is at level 10, the next spell gets the damage bonus

Name: Excess II
Effect: -10% Damage inflicted  Every 5 spells cast, the state bearer gains 50% Damage inflicted for the next spell  Spells cast must cost at least 1 AP  Once the state is at level 5, the next spell gets the damage bonus

Name: Face-to-Face
Effect: At end of turn, if the bearer is facing an adjacent enemy:  10% of max HP as Armor

Name: Farsighted
Effect: 30% damage inflicted on targets 7 or more cells away  otherwise -15%

Name: Flame Aura
Effect: Flaming (+15 Lvls.) (stackable) for the state bearer, for each damage spell received in melee.  100% of level as Flaming at start of turn if no enemies are adjacent.

Name: Guard Up
Effect: -30% damage received during their own turn.

Name: Gusto
Effect: If the bearer moves themself using a spell:  1 MP (max 2 per turn)

Name: Heartbreaking Blood
Effect: In an uneven round:  The bearer inflicts 25% more damage, and suffers 15% of the damage they inflict

Name: Involuntary Heaviness
Effect: If the bearer is moved outside of their turn: applies Stabilized at the end of their next turn

Name: Last Moment
Effect: If the spell costs 1 WP or more: 5% damage per current WP on the bearer (max. 6)

Name: Light Weapon
Effect: Damage caused by the bearer's weapon is reduced by 20% and applies a poison (Light Weapon) for three turns (second hand excluded) based on the number of AP used by the weapon.

Name: Longevity
Effect: When suffering damage from the front and in melee, once per round:  10% of missing HP as Armor 40% Armor given (1 turn)

Name: Lunatic
Effect: Odd turns, at start of turn:  25% Damage inflicted -25% Heals performed and Armor given  Even turns, at start of turn:  25% Heals performed and Armor given -25% Damage inflicted

Name: Lunatic II
Effect: After inflicting damage on an enemy:  -30% damage inflicted and 30% heals performed and Armor given for the following turn. After healing or giving armor to an ally:  30% damage inflicted and -30% heals performed and armor given for the following turn.

Name: Modularity
Effect: After taking damage:  50 Elemental Resistance in this element (1 turn), not stackable A new element replaces the previous one

Name: Natural Poise
Effect: 50 Elemental Resistance if the bearer has no Armor otherwise -100 Elemental Resistance

Name: Peaceful
Effect: For each movement, per MP used:  +3% Block (max. 18) (1 turn)  If the state bearer performs a Block when it's not their turn:  The bonus is transformed into Critical Hits on the next turn

Name: Rebirth
Effect: -50 Elemental Resistance  Once per turn, when falling below 50% HP:  1 MP 15% Damage inflicted 50 Elemental Resistance

Name: Robust
Effect: 100% of level in Barrier against long-range damage (permanent)

Name: Sentinel
Effect: At start of turn:  3 Range 15% ranged damage 15% Heals performed  The bonus is lost the first time the character moves (MP) or at end of turn

Name: Single Shared Armor
Effect: 30% of Armor given to allies who do not have Armor -50% Armor to allies who already have Armor

Name: Single Shared Armor II
Effect: 40% Armor given on the first Armor placed on this turn -50% Armor given on all others

Name: Smashell
Effect: The first spell that inflicts damage this turn removes 30% Armor from the target

Name: Sparkle
Effect: At start of turn, if the bearer has no Armor:  20% Damage inflicted (1 turn)  Otherwise: -10% Damage inflicted (1 turn)

Name: Stasification
Effect: The state bearer increases their damage inflicted by 2% per turn (permanent) (max 20)

Name: Time Control
Effect: Every 3 spells cast Critical Hit is set to 100

Name: Trust
Effect: 30% Block if the bearer did not receive healing in the previous turn.

Name: Vehemence
Effect: Each turn steals 50% of damage inflicted by the first spell that inflicts damage -50% Armor received

Name: Yeah
Effect: Even Turn:  After using a WP-based spell, the state bearer regains 2 AP (max of 1/turn).  Odd Turn:  After using a WP-based spell, the state bearer loses 2 AP (max 1/turn).
